title: Underwater Mermaid Birthday Cake
description: Whimsical ocean-themed cake featuring pastel ombré buttercream, mermaid tails, sea-coral decorations, starfish, and an adorable personalised name plaque—a magical centerpiece for any little mermaid’s birthday.
ingredients: Strawberry sponge, vanilla sponge, vanilla buttercream, fondant mermaid tails, fondant sea decorations, edible pearls
